title: Rabbi Aryeh Lebowitz Daf Yomi Shabbos Daf 02
text:
Today's דף daf is שבת דף ב Shabbos Daf Beis . Today's שיעור shiur is sponsored by Uri Burger in honor of his being מסיים masiyam ש\"ס Shas yesterday. I find that very inspiring that he began ש\"ס Shas with שבת דף ב Shabbos Daf Beis . So sometimes people miss out on ברכות berachos and they see everyone else doing ברכות berachos instead of saying, \"Ah, I'll wait until next cycle,\" they start right then on שבת Shabbos . So מזל טוב mazel tov to Uri Burger for finishing ש\"ס Shas and also by Dr. David Lander in honor of his wife and children and by Shaki Klar לזכר נשמת l'zecher nishmas ינטי בת אברהם Yenti bas Avraham . We thank them all very much for the sponsorship. So a little bit of an introduction to מסכת שבת Maseches

--- excerpt separator ---

and the משנה mishna in שבועות Shavuos רשויות קתני reshuyos kasni . רשויות שבת שתים reshuyos Shabbos shtayim . They're both, the תנא tana is telling us that יציאות yetzios , יציאות yetzios doesn't mean הוצאה hotza'ah but it means רשויות reshuyos of שבת Shabbos . And there's a רשות היחיד reshus ha-yachid , a רשות הרבים reshus ha-rabim , and you're being מעביר ma'avir a חפץ chefetz between those רשויות reshuyos in four different ways. And then, for the guy standing inside and four different ways for the guy standing outside. So now I understand why it says יציאות yetzios and then lists הכנסות hachnasos . Not because הכנסה hachnasa is also called הוצאה hotza'ah , but because יציאות yetzios is just about transferring from רשות reshus to רשות reshus . יציאה yetzia is not a לשון lashon .
